title: Concrete Stress Strain Calculator
description: Determine concrete stress strain based on Mander's (1988) theory.

B.description: Section Width (B). Symbol: B. Units: mm

D.description: Section Height (D). Symbol: D. Units: mm

C.description: Clear Cover (C). Symbol: C. Units: mm

w.description: Clear Distance Between Longitudinal Bars (w). Symbol: w. Units: mm

s.description: Transverse Spacing (s). Symbol: s. Units: mm

Db.description: Transverse Bar Diameter (dbt). Symbol: db_t. Units: mm

Ds.description: Shear Bar Diameter (ds). Symbol: d_s. Units: mm

fco.description: Characteristic Compressive Strength of Concrete (fco). Symbol: f_{co}. Units: MPa

fyh.description: Yield Strength of Transverse Reinforcement (fyh). Symbol: f_{yh}. Units: MPa

fy.description: Yield Strength of Main Reinforcement (fy). Symbol: f_{y}. Units: MPa

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
